name: Email delivery (Brevo)
description: Closes the '201 ≠ delivered' gap. Brevo's transactional API returns 201 the instant it accepts the POST; the actual SMTP relay happens async. This dashboard surfaces the RECEIVER-side ledger updates (api /webhooks/brevo/:secret) so the team sees what Brevo's relay actually did, not what the API said it would do. Source: brevo_webhook_events_total Prometheus counter + forwarder_sent rows via NRQL log queries.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(sum(brevo_webhook_events_total), WHERE event = 'delivered') AS 'delivered %' FROM Metric WHERE event IN ('delivered', 'bounced_hard', 'bounced_soft', 'rejected', 'complaint', 'deferred', 'unsubscribed', 'error') SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(brevo_webhook_events_total) FROM Metric FACET event SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT percentage(sum(brevo_webhook_events_total), WHERE event = 'delivered') AS 'delivered %' FROM Metric WHERE event IN ('delivered', 'bounced_hard', 'bounced_soft', 'rejected', 'complaint', 'deferred', 'unsubscribed', 'error') TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT rate(sum(brevo_webhook_events_total), 5 minutes) FROM Metric WHERE event IN ('delivered', 'bounced_hard', 'bounced_soft', 'rejected', 'complaint', 'deferred', 'unsubscribed', 'error', 'unhandled') FACET event TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT rate(sum(brevo_webhook_events_total), 5 minutes) FROM Metric WHERE event IN ('unauthorized', 'invalid_payload', 'oversized', 'missing_message_id') FACET event TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Send-vs-deliver (worker INFO logs vs receiver INFO logs)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE message IN ('email.brevo.event_sent', 'webhook.brevo.delivered') FACET message TIMESERIES AUTO
